MissingApplicationAdministrator.title: Request Entra administrator consent
operatorSteps: Pause the install before deployment.
Ask the customer to provide a Global Administrator, Cloud Application Administrator, or Application Administrator.
Retry the permissions check after the administrator is available.
MissingApplicationAdministrator.customerMessage: We are ready to continue the PageMaker365 install, but need an authorized Entra administrator to approve the application permissions.

AzureTenantMismatch.title: Switch to the correct Azure tenant
operatorSteps: Confirm the tenant ID in the customer package.
Sign in to Azure using an account from that tenant.
Rerun preflight after the Azure context matches the package.
AzureTenantMismatch.customerMessage: The installer is currently signed in to a different Azure tenant than the one in the PageMaker365 install package. Please sign in with the correct tenant account before continuing.

GraphNotSignedIn.title: Sign in to Microsoft Graph
operatorSteps: Start a Microsoft Graph sign-in session.
Use the required consent scopes for Entra and SharePoint validation.
Rerun preflight after sign-in completes.
GraphNotSignedIn.customerMessage: The installer needs Microsoft Graph sign-in to validate Entra and SharePoint readiness before deployment.

AzureRbacInsufficient.title: Grant Azure deployment access
operatorSteps: Confirm the target subscription and resource group from the customer package.
Ask the customer's Azure administrator to grant Contributor or Owner access.
Rerun Azure preflight after access is granted.
AzureRbacInsufficient.customerMessage: The installer can see the Azure tenant, but the signed-in account may not have enough access to deploy PageMaker365 resources.

GraphConsentScopesMissing.title: Approve required Graph scopes
operatorSteps: Start Microsoft Graph sign-in from the installer.
Use an account allowed to approve tenant-level application consent.
Approve the requested app, directory, and SharePoint scopes.
GraphConsentScopesMissing.customerMessage: The installer needs additional Microsoft Graph permissions to validate Entra and SharePoint readiness.

EntraAdminRoleMissing.title: Use an Entra administrator
operatorSteps: Ask for a Global Administrator, Cloud Application Administrator, or Application Administrator.
Have that admin complete Microsoft Graph sign-in and consent.
Rerun preflight after the admin role check passes.
EntraAdminRoleMissing.customerMessage: The current account may not be allowed to approve the PageMaker365 application permissions.

SharePointSiteResolveFailed.title: Resolve SharePoint site access
operatorSteps: Confirm the SharePoint site URL in the package.
Confirm Microsoft Graph is signed in to the same tenant.
Approve Sites.Read.All or the final Sites.Selected consent model, then rerun preflight.
SharePointSiteResolveFailed.customerMessage: The installer could not confirm access to the SharePoint site that PageMaker365 will use.
